title: The Amber Bead.
content:
I saw a fly within a bead
    Of amber cleanly buried;
    The urn was little, but the room
    More rich than Cleopatra's tomb.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Amber Bead.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
